## Feature Summary
<!-- A brief summary of the feature you'd like to see -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe -->
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like -->
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Describe alternatives you've considered -->
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases

<!-- Describe specific use cases for this feature -->

### Use Case 1
**As a** [type of user]
**I want** [some goal]
**So that** [some reason]

### Use Case 2
**As a** [type of user]
**I want** [some goal]
**So that** [some reason]

## Implementation Ideas

<!-- If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, please share -->

### Technical Approach
- API changes needed
- Database schema changes
- UI/UX considerations

### Integration Points
- Which existing components would be affected?
- Are there external integrations needed?

## Mockups / Examples

<!-- If applicable, add mockups or examples from other tools -->

## Benefits

<!-- Describe the benefits this feature would bring -->
- [ ] Improved user experience
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] New capability
- [ ] Better integration
- [ ] Cost reduction
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Priority

<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->
- [ ] Critical - blocking my work
- [ ] High - would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - would be useful eventually

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here -->

## Would you be willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this feature
- [ ] Yes, I can help test this feature
- [ ] Yes, I can provide documentation
- [ ] No, I'm unable to contribute at this time

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided a clear use case for this feature
- [ ] I have considered alternative solutions
